parameters.name: get_trivia
parameters.description: Get random trivia questions with answers. Parameters: amount (number of questions, 1-10, default 1), category (optional, e.g. 'science', 'history', 'geography', 'sports', 'art', 'music', 'film', 'animals', 'computers', 'mathematics', 'general'), difficulty (optional: 'easy', 'medium', 'hard')

value.category: ={{ $fromAI('category', 'Trivia category (e.g. science, history, geography, sports). Optional.', 'string') }}

schema.description: Trivia category (e.g. science, history, geography, sports)
